markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Refine the content strategy to counter eroding AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**AI Visibility Eroding:** Core AI prompts are losing traction to competitors (e.g., Udex, Beekeeper), risking Yourco's voice in key conversations.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [**New Content Strategy:** Prioritize high-intent, bottom-of-funnel use cases found in Search Console data (e.g., "how to communicate benefits to a multilingual workforce").](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [**Content Mix Shift:** Shift focus from refreshes to new content, including one template per week (e.g., tables, "steal this method" guides) to match top-ranking articles.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
  - [**Systematize Internal Linking:** Automate linking via a cluster map in the AI workflow to fix current randomness and ensure new content is immediately cross-referenced.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Eroding AI Visibility

  - [Analysis shows a slow erosion of core AI prompt visibility, driven by increased competitor investment.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [**Competitor Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
      - [**Udex:** Despite low brand exposure, Udex has strong AI visibility, creating a risk of being outranked in specific searches.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
      - [**Beekeeper:** A more established competitor where Yourco needs to increase its presence.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [**Action:** Add new prompts to track Udex and Beekeeper to monitor their AI performance and inform content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)

### Solution: New Content Strategy

  - [**New Content Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
      - [Shift from broad topics to specific use cases found in Search Console data.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Low-position keywords with clicks signal high user demand and intent.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [**Content Mix:**](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
      - [**Refreshes:** Deprioritize for now.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Recent refreshes are still performing well, and the immediate need is to capture new, high-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
      - [**New Content:** Prioritize new articles based on strategic intent and use cases, as search volumes are similar across many options.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [**New Content Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
    1.  [**"Best" Lists:** `Best employee apps` & `Best reporting system`](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
    2.  [**Use Cases:** `How to communicate benefits to a multilingual workforce` & `How can I send lockout, tagout procedures`](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
    3.  [**Template:** `Employee recognition messages` (to include a template)](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)

### Solution: Systematize Internal Linking

  - [**Problem:** Current internal linking is random and lacks a strategic, cluster-based approach.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [**Solution:** Automate linking by integrating a cluster map into the AI content workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
      - [**Process:** The AI will reference the map during drafting to suggest relevant links based on the article's topic.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Creates a scalable, consistent system that can be easily updated by modifying the central map, reducing manual effort.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [**Action:** Begin by manually fixing links on \~50 articles with at least half a click, prioritizing links to top-performing content within the same cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)

### Project Updates

  - [**Orphan Pages:** The analytics team is prioritizing interlinking orphan pages.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [**"Y" Yourco Redirect:** This project is also in progress but is lower priority, as the redirect already mitigates the immediate SEO risk.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
      - [Add new prompts to track Udex and Beekeeper AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [Conduct keyword research using the new use case topics as seeds.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [Follow up on the portal login for workshops/videos.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [Begin implementing the automated internal linking system.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
      - [Remind the production team to link to new content in subsequent articles.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [**Jessica:**](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [Finalize feedback on Pamela's draft today.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [Prioritize the new content pipeline in the spreadsheet.](https://fathom.video/share/F5jkRJGiCgkFW4xeaVqSZXwTm1xX4xSc?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
